source_observations: The launch story becomes more persuasive when system breadth is reduced to a few high-contrast product surfaces instead of a catalogue.
A launch deck feels more deliberate when setup pauses, proof builds, climax expands, and close removes detail.
source_teaching_rules: For cover and setup roles, show one launch promise and one native system surface before introducing detailed proof.
Map pacing to the six-slide rhythm so proof density rises only after the audience has a clear orientation beat.
native_ppt_composition_implications: one poster-scale generated deck object owns the first read
memory controls sit as a midground field, not equal feature cards
use native editable shapes, masks, type, connectors, and generated vector-like illustration only
make object relationships visible through scale, depth, overlap, cropping, and reveal order
source_boundary_rules: do not copy screenshots, source layouts, video frames, audio, transcript text, brand marks, icons, or tutorial examples
use source records as teaching constraints, not as visual templates
multimodal_composition_decomposition_rec.qa_probe: At contact-sheet scale, the slide should read as a composed object scene, not as three labeled geometry slots.
